positive: A highly stylized, retro-futuristic celestial animal, specifically a bioluminescent cosmic fox, depicted leaping across a deep nebula. The fox should have clean, angular silhouettes, glowing neon accents in electric blue and magenta, and starry, watercolor-effect fur markings. The background must be a minimalist, vaporwave-inspired galaxy swirl with clean divisions of color. Composition must be centered, impactful, and suitable for screen printing or apparel transfer. High contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, volumetric lighting, pop art style, vibrant saturation, flat color blocks combined with glow effects. --ar 1:1
negative: blurry, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, messy background, bad anatomy, multiple limbs, cartoonish, childish, grainy, poor composition
